summary: High‑quality soundboard capture of a mind‑blowing show featuring a stellar Help > Slip > Franklin’s and the soaring "Blow Away".
review: The recording is a clean soundboard source that lets listeners hear the electric energy of this Inglewood performance. Reviewers rave about the first West Coast Help/Slip/Franklin’s sequence and the uplifting "Blow Away", noting Brent's keyboard work as a highlight. Overall the show feels trippy, energetic, and memorable.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers gave 4‑star ratings and praised both the musical performance and the recording; no major issues were reported.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific technical complaints; reviewers imply clear, energetic sound typical of a well‑mixed soundboard tape.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set featured a powerful Help/Slip/Franklin’s segue and maintained high energy throughout, culminating in an uplifting "Blow Away" that left the crowd buzzing.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent is noted as being on top of his game during this run.
